calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Dec-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James T. Straw, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Raymond F. Link, Trustee of the Raymond F. Link and Judith E. Link Living Trust Agreement dated April 21, 1999, who was placed under oath and examined.
Plaintiff Judith E. Link, Trustee of the Raymond F. Link and Judith E. Link Living Trust Agreement dated April 21, 1999, was not present at today's hearing.
Defaults were entered against defendants Dina Alac and Dean Alac on April 8, 2009 and April 15, 2009, respectively.
Plaintiffs' Trial Brief was filed today, November 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Raymond F. Link and Judith E. Link, Trustees of the Raymond F. Link and Judith E. Link Living Trust Agreement dated April 21, 1999, and against the Defaulted Defendants Dean Alac and Dina Alac as follows:

Damages/Principal - $780,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $410,449.48.
Attorney Fees - $3,770.00.
Trustee's Fees - $5,462.36.
Late Fees - $17,923.75.
Costs - $529.57, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,218,135.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
